independent_tests.test_output_summary:
Result:
tests/test_routing.py::TestPurity::test_select_agent_is_synchronous PASSED [ 97%]
tests/test_routing.py::TestPurity::test_record_heartbeat_is_synchronous PASSED [ 98%]
tests/test_routing.py::TestPurity::test_check_timeouts_is_synchronous PASSED [ 99%]
tests/test_routing.py::test_routing_accepts_manifest_registry_list_all PASSED [100%]
============================= 101 passed in 0.22s ==============================

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `select_agent()` returns the agent with highest confidence for the requested intent
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented select_agent() with sort by -confidence, then queue_depth. Test test_returns_agent_with_highest_confidence verifies agent-high (0.95) is selected over agent-low (0.5).
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented select_agent() with sort by -confidence, then queue_depth. Test test_returns_agent_with_highest_confidence verifies agent-high (0.95) is selected over agent-low (0.5).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `select_agent()` breaks confidence ties using `queue_depth` ascending (lower queue preferred)
criteria_verification.evidence: Sort key is (-conf, depth) so equal confidence sorts by ascending queue_depth. Test test_breaks_confidence_tie_by_queue_depth verifies agent-b (depth=1) is selected over agent-a (depth=5) at equal confidence 0.9.
criteria_verification.notes: Sort key is (-conf, depth) so equal confidence sorts by ascending queue_depth. Test test_breaks_confidence_tie_by_queue_depth verifies agent-b (depth=1) is selected over agent-a (depth=5) at equal confidence 0.9.

criteria_verification.evidence: _has_capacity() returns False when active_tasks >= max_concurrent. Test test_skips_agents_at_capacity verifies agent-full (active_tasks=2, max_concurrent=2) is skipped.
criteria_verification.notes: _has_capacity() returns False when active_tasks >= max_concurrent. Test test_skips_agents_at_capacity verifies agent-full (active_tasks=2, max_concurrent=2) is skipped.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `select_agent()` skips agents marked `available=False` in heartbeat records
criteria_verification.evidence: Eligibility filter checks heartbeat.available. Test test_skips_unavailable_agents verifies agent-down (available=False) is skipped despite higher confidence.
criteria_verification.notes: Eligibility filter checks heartbeat.available. Test test_skips_unavailable_agents verifies agent-down (available=False) is skipped despite higher confidence.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `select_agent()` returns `None` when no eligible agent exists (empty fleet or all filtered)
criteria_verification.evidence: Returns None when eligible list is empty. Tests test_returns_none_when_no_eligible_agent (empty list) and test_returns_none_when_all_agents_filtered (wrong intent) both verify None return.
criteria_verification.notes: Returns None when eligible list is empty. Tests test_returns_none_when_no_eligible_agent (empty list) and test_returns_none_when_all_agents_filtered (wrong intent) both verify None return.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `record_heartbeat()` creates a new `HeartbeatRecord` if `agent_id` not in `heartbeats`
criteria_verification.evidence: record_heartbeat() creates HeartbeatRecord when agent_id not found in dict. Test test_creates_new_heartbeat_record verifies creation with correct fields.
criteria_verification.notes: record_heartbeat() creates HeartbeatRecord when agent_id not found in dict. Test test_creates_new_heartbeat_record verifies creation with correct fields.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `record_heartbeat()` resets `available=True` when a heartbeat arrives (recovery from timeout)
criteria_verification.evidence: record_heartbeat() sets record.available = True on existing records. Test test_recovery_resets_available_true verifies previously-unavailable agent becomes available.
criteria_verification.notes: record_heartbeat() sets record.available = True on existing records. Test test_recovery_resets_available_true verifies previously-unavailable agent becomes available.

criteria_verification.evidence: check_timeouts() uses (now - record.last_seen) >= timeout comparison. Test test_marks_agent_unavailable_after_timeout verifies with 100s-old heartbeat.
criteria_verification.notes: check_timeouts() uses (now - record.last_seen) >= timeout comparison. Test test_marks_agent_unavailable_after_timeout verifies with 100s-old heartbeat.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `check_timeouts()` returns the list of newly timed-out `agent_id`s
criteria_verification.evidence: Function returns list of agent_ids that were newly marked unavailable (skips already-unavailable). Test test_returns_newly_timed_out_ids verifies only stale agent returned.
criteria_verification.notes: Function returns list of agent_ids that were newly marked unavailable (skips already-unavailable). Test test_returns_newly_timed_out_ids verifies only stale agent returned.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: An agent at exactly 89s since last heartbeat is NOT timed out
criteria_verification.evidence: Boundary condition: >= 90 means 89s is strictly less. Test test_agent_at_89s_is_not_timed_out uses mock time.monotonic to verify exact 89s boundary.
criteria_verification.notes: Boundary condition: >= 90 means 89s is strictly less. Test test_agent_at_89s_is_not_timed_out uses mock time.monotonic to verify exact 89s boundary.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: An agent at exactly 90s since last heartbeat IS timed out
criteria_verification.evidence: Boundary condition: >= 90 includes exactly 90. Test test_agent_at_90s_is_timed_out uses mock time.monotonic to verify exact 90s boundary.
criteria_verification.notes: Boundary condition: >= 90 includes exactly 90. Test test_agent_at_90s_is_timed_out uses mock time.monotonic to verify exact 90s boundary.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All routing functions are pure (no I/O, no NATS calls)
criteria_verification.evidence: All three functions (select_agent, record_heartbeat, check_timeouts) are synchronous, take data in and return decisions. No NATS imports, no async, no file I/O. Purity tests verify they are not coroutine functions.
criteria_verification.notes: All three functions (select_agent, record_heartbeat, check_timeouts) are synchronous, take data in and return decisions. No NATS imports, no async, no file I/O. Purity tests verify they are not coroutine functions.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
criteria_verification.evidence: ruff check passes with 'All checks passed!' on both source and test files. mypy --strict passes with 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
criteria_verification.notes: ruff check passes with 'All checks passed!' on both source and test files. mypy --strict passes with 'Success: no issues found in 1 source file'.
